headline: M&A Lawyer Denies $10M Insider Trading Allegations

article.title: M&A Lawyer Pleads Not Guilty to Leading Insider-Trading Ring
article.summary: A former mergers and acquisitions lawyer with top firms including Latham & Watkins and Goodwin Procter pleaded not guilty to charges that he led a massive insider trading ring that made tens of millions of dollars in illegal profits.

headline: India Stocks: 50% Risk of Earnings Growth Stall

article.title: Quote of the day by T. Rowe Price: "Detecting with a high degree of accuracy when the long-term earnings growth of a company has ceased is difficult because no mathematical formula can be applied to determine when the change from growth to maturity or decadence occurs."
article.summary: Identifying when a company's growth story begins to fade is a significant challenge for investors. While financial models offer insights, qualitative factors like innovation and market dynamics often dictate a company's lifecycle.
